name: HubSpot
description: Search and manage contacts, deals, and companies in HubSpot CRM. Requires a Private App token from your HubSpot account.

auth.hint: Create a Private App token in Settings → Integrations → Private Apps.

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search CRM contacts by name, email, or company. Returns contact details and properties.

params.name: query
params.description: Search term, e.g. name or email address

params.name: properties
params.description: List of property names to include, e.g. ["firstname","email","phone"]

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get a contact by their HubSpot ID with all stored properties.

params.name: properties
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to return

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create a new contact in HubSpot CRM.

params.name: properties
params.description: Contact properties as an object, e.g. {"firstname":"Ana","email":"ana@co.com","phone":"123"}

tools.name: search_deals
tools.description: Search open or closed deals by name, stage, or owner.

tools.name: create_deal
tools.description: Create a new deal in the CRM pipeline.
